title: T-010 — Implement SET-006 First Work Order step (soft redirect to 04-PLANNING-BASIC, skippable)
prompt:
Implement step 5 screen: soft redirect to 04-PLANNING-BASIC create work order, with skip button.

PRD §14.3-14.4 SET-006:
- Optional step (can skip via 'Skip Creating a Work Order' button)
- Shows intro text: "Create your first work order"
- "Proceed to Planning Module" button links to /planning/work-orders (or main create WO flow)
- "Skip" button marks step 5 as skipped and moves to step 6 (completion)
- Supports resume: if user navigates back, same state is recovered

Acceptance:
- Step 5 screen renders with both button options
- 'Proceed' button navigates to WO creation (soft redirect)
- 'Skip' button calls POST /api/v1/onboarding/step {step_number: 5, skip: true} and advances to step 6
- onboarding_state.skipped_steps includes 5 after skip is clicked
- KPI measurement: timestamp is captured when step 5 submitted (completed or skipped) — this triggers <30min P95 window

Test: E2E test verifies skip button marks step 5 as skipped and final step is reachable.

pipeline_inputs.description: Step 5 soft redirect to work order creation (skippable)
pipeline_inputs.details: Create FirstWorkOrderStep component (no form, just UI). Display: title 'Create Your First Work Order', description text, two buttons: (1) 'Proceed to Planning Module' (href to /planning/work-orders or /app/planning/work-orders). (2) 'Skip Creating a Work Order' (calls POST /api/v1/onboarding/step with step_number=5, skip=true). Backend should add 5 to skipped_steps and set current_step=6. After skip or proceed, user can reach step 6 (completion). Match wizard design language. Note: KPI measurement for 'first WO created' (PRD line 57) starts when step 5 is submitted (last user action before completion).
acceptance_criteria: Given step 5 screen is rendered, when user clicks 'Proceed to Planning Module', then user navigates to /planning/work-orders (soft redirect)
Given step 5 screen is rendered, when user clicks 'Skip', then POST /api/v1/onboarding/step with step_number=5, skip=true is called
Given skip button clicked, when response returns current_step=6, then step 5 appears in skipped_steps array and next_step is null (completion reached)
test_strategy: Write e2e test: test_work_order_step_skip() clicks skip button and verifies skipped_steps contains 5
Write e2e test: test_work_order_step_redirect() clicks proceed button and verifies href navigation
Verify GET /api/v1/onboarding/resume after skip shows current_step=6 and status='complete'
risk_red_lines: Do not auto-skip this step; only skip on explicit user action
Do not block wizard completion if user skips WO creation
